zh.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai是Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA的兒子，於大約1120年出生在威爾士安格萊。他於大約1142年與Rymel Verch GORONWY在英國威爾斯安格萊結婚。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai是Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA的儿子，于大约1120年出生在威尔士安格萊。他于大约1142年与Rymel Verch GORONWY在英国威尔斯安格萊结婚。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Bran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Jose, Cesar, Miguel, Beatriz, Blanca, Candido, Concepcion, Elena, Fernando, Gerardo.
Galician: habitational name from either of two places in Lugo province called Bran. This surname is most common in Guatemala and Colombia.

variants.name: Brann
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): from a Brittonic Celtic personal name Bran (from bran ‘raven’). The name was imported to England from Brittany following the Norman Conquest.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): Hebrew acronym consisting of ben rabi ‘son of’ + the initials of some personal name such as Nachman, Nahum, or Nathan.

nameMeanings.name: Llywarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional, now only occasionally used: compound of the god's name Lugu- ( see Lleu ) + Old Celtic marcos ‘horse’.

en.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai was born about 1120, in Anglesey, Wales as the son of Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA. He married Rymel Verch GORONWY about 1142, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai est né environ 1120, à Anglesey, Galles, fils de Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA. Il a épousé Rymel Verch GORONWY environ 1142, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai wurde um 1120 in Anglesey, Wales, als Sohn von Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA geboren. Er hat um 1142 in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom Rymel Verch GORONWY geheiratet.

it.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai è nato il circa 1120 nel Anglesey, Galles come figlio di Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA. Lui sposato Rymel Verch GORONWY circa 1142, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menaiは約1120年にウェールズアングレセイでBran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEAの息子として生まれた。約1142年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイでRymel Verch GORONWYと結婚した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai(은)는 대략 1120년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1142년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 Rymel Verch GORONWY(와)과 결혼했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Anglesey, Gales filho de Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA. Ele casou-se com Rymel Verch GORONWY aproximadamente 1142, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai родился около 1120 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс. Его отца звали Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA. Он женился на женщине по имени Rymel Verch GORONWY около 1142 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai nació aproximadamente 1120, en Isla Oscura, Gales como hijo de Bran DINAWAL LORDofANGLESEA. Se casó con Rymel Verch GORONWY aproximadamente 1142, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido.
